title: Stubbin Wood School (Derbyshire): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Stubbin Wood School  URN: 147627  Notice issued to: TEAM Education Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Carol Gray  DfE regional director office: East Midlands  Local authority: Derbyshire County Council  "
